greeting_morning: Good morning, {user_name}. {assistant_name} is steady and available.
Morning, {user_name}. {assistant_name} is ready when you are.
greeting_evening: Good evening, {user_name}. All systems remain available.
small_talk: All core systems are stable this {time_of_day}.
Running smoothly with a {tone} tone. Let me know what you need.
ai_offline: I'm currently unable to reach the AI core.
My processing unit is offline at the moment.
The AI core is unavailable right now, but local systems remain active.
error_timeout: The AI core did not answer in time.
The request exceeded its response window.
I hit a timeout while waiting on the AI core.
